content:
Pluto in Capricorn: Meaning, Traits & Crystals

Pluto in Capricorn blends the archetypal drive of Pluto (where you transform, face power and shadow, and regenerate) with the Earth, cardinal nature of Capricorn.

  • Planet: Pluto — transformation, power, death-rebirth, depth, obsession
  • Sign: Capricorn (Earth/Cardinal) — ambition, structure, responsibility, discipline, achievement

Eastern Perspective
